trend_signal: Public travel packing content shows repeated interest in compact jewelry storage.
evidence_summary: Visible public content suggests users want a cleaner way to store rings, earrings, and necklaces during travel.
target_audience: Women travelers; jewelry owners; gift buyers
pain_point: Jewelry can get tangled, scratched, or lost during travel.
content_angle: Before-and-after packing routine showing messy jewelry versus organized travel case.
risk_note: Avoid copying creator content or competitor images. Verify material claims and zipper quality.
next_action: Check marketplace pricing, review complaints, and supplier customization options.

trend_signal: Public product pages show demand for small tech accessory storage.
evidence_summary: Visible product listings suggest buyers want compact storage for cables, chargers, and small electronics.
target_audience: Remote workers; students; travelers; tech users
pain_point: Cables and small devices are easy to lose or tangle.
content_angle: Desk cleanup routine or travel tech packing routine.
risk_note: Category may be crowded and price-driven. Avoid using competitor photos or copied listing text.
next_action: Analyze reviews for zipper quality, size complaints, and bundle opportunities.

trend_signal: Public review signals mention repeated interest in easy pet hair cleanup.
evidence_summary: Visible review patterns suggest pet owners value products that reduce fur on furniture and clothing.
target_audience: Pet owners; dog owners; cat owners
pain_point: Pet hair sticks to sofas, clothing, car seats, and bedding.
risk_note: Avoid exaggerated claims. Product effectiveness must be tested. Check material quality and return risk.
next_action: Compare competitor reviews and identify common complaints.

trend_signal: Public trend report mentions interest in low-heat beauty routines.
evidence_summary: Visible beauty trend signals suggest consumers may be interested in styling tools that reduce heat exposure.
target_audience: Beauty shoppers; hair care users; gift buyers
pain_point: Some users want curls without frequent heat styling.
content_angle: Morning routine or overnight styling demonstration.
risk_note: Avoid claims about hair health unless verified. Check material and comfort complaints.
next_action: Review public marketplace complaints and short-form content performance.

trend_signal: Public community discussions mention grip and comfort during pilates and home workouts.
evidence_summary: Visible public discussions suggest users care about non-slip performance, comfort, and durability.
target_audience: Pilates users; yoga users; home fitness users
pain_point: Regular socks may slip during workouts.
content_angle: Workout routine demonstration showing grip and stability.
risk_note: Avoid medical or injury prevention claims. Verify material, sizing, and wash durability.
next_action: Check marketplace saturation and review complaints about sizing and grip.
